# Module Test Matrix Template

- Milestone:

## Matrix
| Area | Lane Type | Command | Expected | Actual | Status | Evidence |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

1. Failures and root-cause summary:
2. Added/updated regression coverage:
3. Unresolved findings and disposition:
